channel.title: AI Limitations on Charlotte's AI Lab
channel.description: Recent content in AI Limitations on Charlotte's AI Lab

item.title: Apple's Co-Founder Says He's 'Not a Fan of AI' — What's He Really Disappointed About?
item.description: On Apple’s 50th anniversary, co-founder Steve Wozniak told CNN and BBC he’s been ‘disappointed a lot’ by AI. His criticisms cut deeper than you’d expect.
